name: Cross-Sectional Equity Momentum (12-1 Factor)
description: Rank a universe of stocks (e.g. Russell 1000) by their trailing 12-month return, skipping the most recent month to avoid short-term reversal. Long the top 20% (past winners), short the bottom 20% (past losers). Rebalance monthly.
core_logic: Score(i) = Return(t-252, t-21). Long decile 1, short decile 10. Portfolio is sector-neutralized and beta-neutralized.

risk.main_risk: Momentum crashes after sharp market reversals

pros: Most robust documented factor across asset classes
cons: Momentum crashes are sudden and severe
